provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against claude. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Deserializing untrusted bytes with ObjectInputStream is a remote-code-execution risk (gadget chains). Options:
- Replace Java serialization with JSON plus schema validation.
- If serialization must stay, install an ObjectInputFilter allowlist (serialFilter) restricted to expected classes.
- Authenticate and integrity-check queue messages first.
